overall.description: A cinematic scene from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a woman washing clothes with a washboard in a metal tub at a forest camp during golden hour. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the teepees and pine trees in the background before the character stands and exits the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest camp with teepee and washing station

agents.ego_description: stationary camera focused on the woman performing washing activities

notable_agents.action: kneeling and scrubbing clothes vigorously on a wooden washboard in a metal tub

entered.detail: traditional conical tent with wooden poles and canvas covering
large round metal basin filled with water for washing clothes
ribbed wooden board used for scrubbing laundry
rustic wooden seating next to the washing area
large moss-covered boulder beside the bench
tall pine trees surrounding the camp clearing

segments.scene_description: A static shot of a forest camp at dusk, with a woman kneeling beside a metal wash tub in the foreground. She rhythmically scrubs clothes on a wooden washboard while teepees stand in the background among pine trees. The warm golden hour light filters through the trees, illuminating the rustic camp setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest camp with teepee and washing station

events.description: woman stops washing, stands up from the ground
woman walks away toward the right side of the frame and exits view

agents.ego_description: stationary camera watching the woman depart the scene

notable_agents.action: walking away from the washing area toward the right edge of the frame

segments.scene_description: The woman finishes her washing, stands up from the tub, and walks away to the right, leaving the washing station empty. The camera remains fixed on the now-abandoned camp scene with the washboard resting against the tub and the teepees still visible in the background as the character exits the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a quiet moment of domestic labor in a forest camp that transitions into a still, abandoned landscape. It begins with a woman kneeling beside a metal wash tub, rhythmically scrubbing clothes on a wooden washboard as warm golden hour light filters through the surrounding pine trees and teepees. As she finishes her task, the focus shifts from her active movement to the stillness of the rustic setting. The woman then stands and walks out of the frame to the right, leaving the washing station empty. Finally, the camera remains fixed on the vacant camp, where the washboard rests against the tub under the fading glow of the dusk sky.
